title: Install external vehicle equipment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install external vehicle equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install external vehicle equipment

pcs.text: Determine job requirements and interpret vehicle specifications from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) guides or authorised agency and workplace inspection procedures 1.2 Confirm external vehicle equipment according to regulatory requirements, standards and safety data sheets (SDS) 1.3 Select installation option according to the identified job requirements1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures1.5 Prepare tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements and interpret vehicle specifications from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) guides or authorised agency and workplace inspection procedures 1.2 Confirm external vehicle equipment according to regulatory requirements, standards and safety data sheets (SDS) 1.3 Select installation option according to the identified job requirements1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures1.5 Prepare tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements and interpret vehicle specifications from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) guides or authorised agency and workplace inspection procedures 1.2 Confirm external vehicle equipment according to regulatory requirements, standards and safety data sheets (SDS) 1.3 Select installation option according to the identified job requirements1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures1.5 Prepare tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install external vehicle equipment

elements.title: Assess external vehicle safety features

pcs.text: Conduct safety inspection of vehicle body according to workplace policies and procedures2.2 Report on vehicle safety features according to SDS2.3 Select and source external vehicle equipment according to job requirements2.4 Check external vehicle equipment for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct safety inspection of vehicle body according to workplace policies and procedures2.2 Report on vehicle safety features according to SDS2.3 Select and source external vehicle equipment according to job requirements2.4 Check external vehicle equipment for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct safety inspection of vehicle body according to workplace policies and procedures2.2 Report on vehicle safety features according to SDS2.3 Select and source external vehicle equipment according to job requirements2.4 Check external vehicle equipment for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess external vehicle safety features

elements.title: Complete installation and test external vehicle equipment

pcs.text: Install external vehicle equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, without interfering with existing systems 3.2 Conduct post-installation testing of external vehicle equipment and rectify faults where required according to workplace policies and procedures3.3 Conduct final inspection and confirm vehicle is ready for use according to road safety standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install external vehicle equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, without interfering with existing systems 3.2 Conduct post-installation testing of external vehicle equipment and rectify faults where required according to workplace policies and procedures3.3 Conduct final inspection and confirm vehicle is ready for use according to road safety standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install external vehicle equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, without interfering with existing systems 3.2 Conduct post-installation testing of external vehicle equipment and rectify faults where required according to workplace policies and procedures3.3 Conduct final inspection and confirm vehicle is ready for use according to road safety standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete installation and test external vehicle equipment

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Clean work area, collect recyclable material and dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials4.2 Store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Document vehicle safety inspection and installation process according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean work area, collect recyclable material and dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials4.2 Store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Document vehicle safety inspection and installation process according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean work area, collect recyclable material and dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials4.2 Store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Document vehicle safety inspection and installation process according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
